title: Ability Weapon
description: Added some fun weapons to the mc
body:
![Ability Weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ad8036bc7a90f0c704f0cae2ccf9ba4ca6b61a.png)


# About Mod
This mod adds a number of weapons to the mc, many of which come with various effects, and they're all pretty strong, at least for the original version:)

Weapon types in the mod are melee weapons and long range weapons.
All weapons are basically divided into four rank:

- **C-rank**
- **B-rank**
- **A-rank**
- **S-rank**

S-rank weapons are the most powerful and hardest to obtain of all weapons.
Their existence will upend the balance of the original mc!

_~~Of course, if you add the mod while playing the modpacks, it may affect your gaming experience because the mod weapons are too powerful!~~_


### **warning**
_This mod's S-ranked weapons are all very unbalanced for the original, as many unconventional effects are added, and by simply obtaining an S-ranked weapon, you'll be transformed into a near-invincible being for the original!_

**In addition to the basic weapons that come with the mod, more weapons will be added in the future, you can also provide your models and let me add them to the mod, please visit my issue tracker for details**
